heading: Availability of appropriations
label: 3612 Availability of appropriations
text: Funds appropriated to an entity of the Federal Government other than an element of the Department of Defense that have been specifically appropriated for the purchase of cryptologic equipment, materials, or services with respect to which the National Security Agency has been designated as the central source of procurement for the Government shall remain available for a period of three fiscal years.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified in a note under prior to editorial reclassification as this section.section 402 of this title
